name: Nuked Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1.5-quart casserole dish, stir together sugar and corn syrup.
2. Microwave at HIGH for 4 minutes.
3. Stir in peanuts.
4. Microwave at HIGH for 3-5 minutes, until light brown.
5. Add butter and vanilla to the syrup, blending well.
6. Microwave at HIGH for 1-2 more minutes. The peanuts will be lightly browned and the syrup very hot.
7. Add baking soda and gently stir until light and foamy.
8. Quickly pour the mixture onto a lightly greased cookie sheet or an unbuttered non-stick coated cookie sheet.
9. Let cool for 1/2-1 hour.
10. When cool, break into small pieces and store in an airtight container. Makes about 1 pound.
